gitCommit.subject: fix(csp): add imagedelivery.net + cloudflarestream.com to connect-src (#807)
gitCommit.body: fix(csp): add imagedelivery.net + cloudflarestream.com to connect-src (#807) P0 FIX: Service Worker was blocked by CSP from fetching Cloudflare Images URLs. The connect-src directive was missing imagedelivery.net, causing ALL image cache operations in sw.js to fail with CSP violations. Changes: - connect-src: +imagedelivery.net +*.cloudflarestream.com +videodelivery.net - frame-src: +iframe.cloudflarestream.com (video embeds) Root cause: img-src had 'https:' wildcard (so tags worked) but connect-src (which governs fetch()) did not include the CDN domains. The SW intercepts image requests via fetch(), hitting the stricter policy. Impact: PWA image cache was 100% non-functional in production.

specs.title: 93 · Login com credenciais inválidas permanece em /login
94 · RLS bloqueia leitura de tabelas sensíveis para o usuário comum
clique em 'Continuar com Google' dispara authorize com provider=google
/auth/callback com code válido troca por sessão e autentica usuário
/auth/callback com ?error= mostra hint detalhado e código do erro
mostra erro para link inválido (sem token)
renderiza formulário quando há token no hash
valida força da senha e critérios em tempo real
deve realizar login com sucesso e redirecionar para a home

annotations.description: E2E_ADMIN_EMAIL/PASSWORD ou E2E_USER_EMAIL/PASSWORD não configurados — smoke login pulado em CI sem credenciais

specs.title: deve bloquear acesso a rotas protegidas quando deslogado
